programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society face real-life challenges and find solutions for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi informs everyone that he wants to organise a party during the winter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan Singh Sodhi calls his neighbors together and proposes a neighborhood winter party.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society face real-life challenges and find solutions for it.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: An accident leaves Dr Dev with an eight-year gap in his memory, forcing him to start over.

programme.desc: A woman strives to balance her family responsibilities and emotional turmoils.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and Popatlal hide inside Abduls shop after spotting Babita and Iyer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhis childhood friends go to Bhides home searching for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan is furious to learn that nobody informed her about Sodhis illness.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to convince Roshan to stay at Bhides house. Later, Roshan calls Sodhi.

programme.desc: An accident leaves Dr Dev with an eight-year gap in his memory, forcing him to start over.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Naman confronts Cheetah about his plan to get engaged to Mishti and threatens him.

programme.desc: Chaos ensues as a semi-naked man walks into Mahila Police Thana and stuns everyone.

programme.desc: Karishma finds herself in trouble as Haseena asks her to reopen Keshavs case.

programme.desc: Keshavs boss scolds Keshav for slacking and orders him to send the presentation file immediately.

programme.desc: Champaklal makes Jethalal call Sodhi who admits that he is enjoying himself thoroughly.

programme.desc: Roshan and other Gokuldham residents overhear Sodhi bragging to his friends.

programme.desc: Anjali hears about the upcoming party from Taarak and allows him to attend it.
